summary: Tested all 8 Pet Life OS pre-launch sprint bug fixes. All features verified working correctly via browser automation (mobile 390px + desktop 1280px). Tested: mobile tab bar fixes (no double rows), PillarSoulProfile portal z-index, desktop Services tab label standardisation (🐕), DineSoulPageDesktopLegacy 3-tab structure, AdoptSoulPage sectioned products, GuidedCarePaths modal scrollbar suppression.

issues: Comment at line 83 is outdated: says 'sit below the h-14 (56px) sticky Navbar' but top is now 0, not 56px. The comment should say 'sticks at top of viewport (covers navbar on scroll)'. Minor cosmetic issue in CSS comment only.

passing_tests: DineSoulPage mobile (390px): Tab bar shows 🍲 Dine | 🐕 Services | 📍 Find Restaurants WITHOUT DineCategoryStrip above it ✅
DineSoulPage mobile: DineCategoryStrip appears INSIDE Dine tab content, below tab bar ✅
CareMobilePage (390px): Tab bar shows 🌿 Care | 🐕 Services | 📍 Find Care WITHOUT CareCategoryStrip above it ✅
CareMobilePage: CareCategoryStrip (& Skin, Wellness, Senior Care, Supplements, Soul Care) appears INSIDE Care tab content ✅
PillarSoulProfile drawer: Opens via ReactDOM.createPortal - confirmed by fixed overlay at body level with z-index: 100000 ✅
PillarSoulProfile drawer: Covers full screen including navbar (drawer visible above navbar) ✅
Desktop CareSoulPage: Services tab label is '🐕 Services' (was ✂️ Care Services before fix) ✅
Desktop GoSoulPage: Services tab label is '🐕 Services' (was 🗺️ Book a Service before fix) ✅
Desktop DineSoulPageDesktopLegacy: 3 tabs present — '🍽️ Eat & Nourish', '🗺️ Dine Out', '🐕 Services' ✅
Desktop AdoptSoulPage: Sectioned products rendering — 'Arrival Essentials' (6 products), 'Home Readiness', 'Enrichment & Bonding' sections visible ✅
GuidedCarePaths modal (components/care/GuidedCarePaths.jsx): Has className='no-sb', scrollbarWidth:'none', msOverflowStyle:'none' — no styled scrollbar ✅
GuidedCarePaths modal: Uses createPortal to document.body with z-index 10000 ✅
LearnSoulPage: Services tab uses '🐕 Services' at lines 1030 and 2099 ✅
GoMobilePage: GoCategoryStrip moved inside Go tab content (line 189) — no double row ✅
PlayMobilePage: PlayCategoryStrip moved inside Play tab content (line 209) — no double row ✅
App.css: .no-sb global class and [style*='overflow-y: auto'] selector rules added correctly ✅
ios-tab-bar CSS: top changed from 56px to 0 (sticky at top of viewport) ✅
notes: AdoptSoulPage 'Breed Essentials' section does not appear for Mojo (Indie breed) — this is correct conditional behavior. The section only renders when breed-specific adopt products exist (sub_category containing '-adopt' + breed slug). For Indie breed, no such products are seeded.

GuidedCarePaths.jsx in /app/frontend/src/pages/GuidedCarePaths.jsx is a different file from /app/frontend/src/components/care/GuidedCarePaths.jsx. The component actually used by CareSoulPage (line 29) is the one in components/care/ — which has the correct no-sb implementation.
action_items: MINOR: Update CSS comment on line 83 of mobile-design-system.css from 'sit below the h-14 (56px) sticky Navbar' to 'sticks at top of viewport' since top value is now 0 not 56px (cosmetic only, no functional impact)
critical_code_review_comments: GuidedCarePaths: There are TWO files — /pages/GuidedCarePaths.jsx (not using no-sb) and /components/care/GuidedCarePaths.jsx (correctly uses no-sb + scrollbarWidth:none). The pages/ version is used only by GuidedNutritionPaths-style references; the components/care/ version is the correct one used by CareSoulPage. The pages/ version's modal at line 679 has only overflowY:'auto' without no-sb class — could show styled scrollbar if ever used.

AdoptSoulPage.jsx: rawProducts state and adoptSections useMemo correctly implemented. However, the useEffect at line 256 doesn't re-run when petData changes (it uses petData inside but doesn't list it as a dependency). This means if the user switches pets, rawProducts might still be filtered for the previous pet. Minor data-freshness bug.
ios-tab-bar top:0 change: Comment says 'sit below Navbar' but value is 0 — inconsistency. The change is intentional (tab bar now covers navbar when sticky). Low risk.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 Pet Life OS pre-launch sprint bug fixes verified. Mobile tab bar double-row issue fixed (category strips moved inside tab content for Dine, Care, Go, Play pages). PillarSoulProfile portal z-index fix working (z-index 100000 via ReactDOM.createPortal). Desktop Services tab labels standardised to 🐕 Services across Care, Go, Dine, Learn. DineSoulPageDesktopLegacy now has 3 tabs. AdoptSoulPage shows sectioned products. GuidedCarePaths modal has no styled scrollbars. ios-tab-bar now sticky at top:0 (was 56px). Note: There are two GuidedCarePaths files - the one in components/care/ is the correct one with no-sb implementation used by CareSoulPage.
rca_of_issue: Double navigation rows were caused by CategoryStrip components being rendered ABOVE the ios-tab-bar in the JSX tree. Fix: moved CategoryStrip renders inside the first tab content block (conditionally rendered only when that tab is active). PillarSoulProfile z-index was caused by ancestor overflow-hidden containing the drawer - fix: ReactDOM.createPortal to document.body with z-index 100000 bypasses CSS stacking context.
